name: Friendship Fruitcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix starter, 2 1/2 cups sugar and peaches. Stir on days 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, and 9.
2. On the tenth day, add 2 cups sugar and pineapple chunks. Cover. Stir on days 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, and 19.
3. On the twentieth day, add 2 cups sugar, fruit cocktail, and cherries. Cover and stir. Stir on days 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26, 27, 28, and 29.
4. Drain juice from fruit and divide fruit into 3 equal parts. Divide juice into five 1 1/2 cup portions and give to friends.
5. To make the cake, mix cake mix, oil, eggs, and pudding on low speed of mixer. Batter will be thick. Add fruit and nuts. Bake in a well greased and floured Bundt or tube pan. Bake for 45-60 minutes, depending on oven, at 350°F.
6. Cakes may be refrigerated for 2 weeks or frozen up to 2 years. DO NOT freeze juice.
